title: The Webb Fund | The Webb Schools | Private Boarding & Day School in CA
content:
Join The Webb Fund Campaign 2025-26
Individual philanthropy is an essential resource that benefits all aspects of life at Webb. The Webb Fund supports everything from our unique experiential learning opportunities to the recruitment and retention of our esteemed faculty, and encompassing financial aid to students for whom a Webb education would not otherwise be possible. Please join us with a gift today to help sustain the Webb experience for generations to come.
Last year, over 1,400 alumni, parents, and friends made gifts to The Webb Schools and the Raymond M. Alf Museum of Paleontology. We hope you will take a moment to show your support for this year’s drive. Thank you for your consideration and for honoring the entire Webb community through your generosity.
If you have any questions, or if you wish to make a gift of stock or send a wire transfer, contact the Advancement Office at (909) 482-5223 or
giving@webb.org
.
List of 1 items.
The Hastings Society
The Hastings Society recognizes donors who support The Webb Fund year after year. Named for Alfred B. Hastings, Jr. ’42, this society honors our most loyal supporters who embody Al’s commitment to our community. A distinguished alumnus, life trustee and consistent donor, Al dedicated his life to the advancement of The Webb Schools, giving every year and joining the Thompson & Vivian Webb Society by making a planned gift. He was an early champion of the Vivian Webb School and a close friend to Thompson and Vivian Webb.
Membership in the Hastings Society is automatic after you have made a gift to The Webb Fund for three consecutive fiscal years (measured from July 1 to June 30). You remain a member of The Hastings Society each year you renew your annual support.
Members will be given special recognition in the Report of the Schools and take pride in knowing they are among our most steadfast supporters. For more information on joining The Hastings Society, please contact the Advancement Office at (909) 482-5223 or
giving@webb.org
.
Give Now
